name: Fish Saute in Coconut Milk (Pescado Guisado C
recipeInstructions:
1. Score the whole fish 3 times diagonally on each side.
2. Bring the coconut milk to a boil in a skillet over moderate heat.
3. Add the fish and baste for 3 minutes.
4. Add the salt, black pepper, sweet green pepper, tomato, and celery.
5. Continue to baste for 5 minutes.
6. Simmer the fish in an uncovered skillet over low heat, turning the fish once, for 10 minutes.
7. Serve warm.
